scale.label: text-sm font-bold tracking-widest uppercase font-manrope text-[#A1A1AA]

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] flex flex-col bg-[#0A0A0A] overflow-y-auto pb-8

cards.instructions: Use rounded-[24px] for the YouTube Music aesthetic. Keep borders subtle (1px white/5) to separate from the deep obsidian background.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00FFB2] text-black font-extrabold h-14 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-lg active:scale-95 transition-transform uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.outline: border-2 border-white/10 text-white h-14 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-bold active:bg-white/5 transition-colors
buttons.play_pause: w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#00FFB2] text-black flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,255,178,0.4)] active:scale-90 transition-all
buttons.skip: w-14 h-14 flex items-center justify-center text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full active:scale-90 transition-all

sliders.track: h-3 bg-white/10 rounded-full w-full relative overflow-hidden
sliders.thumb: w-7 h-7 bg-white rounded-full shadow-lg border-4 border-[#161618] absolute top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 -ml-3.5
sliders.instructions: Use custom thick sliders (h-3 track) for glove visibility, not native thin range inputs.

toggles.container: bg-[#0A0A0A] p-1.5 rounded-full flex relative h-[60px] items-center border border-white/10
toggles.option: flex-1 flex items-center justify-center z-10 font-bold text-sm tracking-wide transition-colors
toggles.active_bg: absolute bg-[#222225] border border-white/5 rounded-full h-[48px] transition-all duration-300 shadow-md

animations.waveform_bar: w-1.5 bg-[#00FFB2] rounded-t-sm origin-bottom transition-transform duration-150

album_art.description: Abstract neon synthwave album cover for the Now Streaming card.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g. data-testid="link-ride-btn", data-testid="play-pause-btn").

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page reactive dashboard simulating a mobile app view.
Restrict the main layout to 'max-w-md mx-auto' to mimic a mobile phone screen on desktop, filling the vertical height.
Use Lucide React for bold, legible UI icons (e.g., Play, Pause, SkipForward, Mic, Headphones).

Implement the 'Rider Speaking' state: Include a prominent test button 'Simulate Rider Speaking'. When active, wrap the intercom/rider section in a glowing Neon Mint border, show an overlay/indicator 'Alex is speaking...', and reduce the height/opacity of the music waveform visualizer to simulate 'ducking'.
Make sure all Sliders (VOX, Volume, Ducking) and buttons are oversized (min-height 56px) to meet the 'glove-friendly' requirement.
Use 'Bebas Neue' for large headings and 'Manrope' for body copy. Extend Tailwind config to support these fonts.
Construct the UI using semantic HTML grouped into cards. Include 1. Group Ride status, 2. Now Streaming controller, and 3. Audio settings.
